title: The ability to group and collapse columns in Monday boards
excerpt:
Description
The columns on our Monday boards are becoming a wild amount. We need all of them, so it would be great it there was a way to group/categorize them to then be able to expand/collapse groups to see pertinent co…

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The columns on our Monday boards are becoming a wild amount. We need all of them, so it would be great it there was a way to group/categorize them to then be able to expand/collapse groups to see pertinent columns as needed.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to easily view columns/data without having to scroll to the right through large amounts of columns.

posts.author: GraceM (Grace MacDonald)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this would be useful. In the meantime if you need a workaround, would creating new views be any use here? We have large numbers of columns on some of our boards and the ‘main table’ view is the only one that shows them all - we use other views for specific purposes, such as one view that shows only the columns related to invoicing information, and one that shows only the columns necessary for the sales team to update.

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Grace - thank you for replying!

We do use views for specific users so they can see only pertinent items to their daily tasks, but we already have 8-10 views, so that is starting to get a little cluttered as well for Admins.

Even in these specific views, there is still a large amount of data, so being able to categorize and collapse it would be very helpful.

Thank you!
